title: Design System: 军师运营后台

display.purpose: Large dashboard figures and major quantified stats.

headline.purpose: Section headers that need quiet authority.

title.purpose: Rows, cards, labels, and primary component text.

mono.purpose: IDs, times, status codes, paths, and technical metadata.

shadows.name: surface-soft
shadows.purpose: Default card, row, stat, and list separation.

shadows.name: panel-soft
shadows.purpose: Login cards, toast surfaces, and elevated account menus.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Button, chip, and row hover state transitions.

components.name: Primary Action Button
components.description: Primary save or submit action inside admin forms.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #A07D2C; background: #A07D2C; color: #FFFFFF; font: 600 13.5px/1 "Noto Sans SC", -apple-system, "PingFang SC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; cursor: pointer; transition: background .16s ease-out, border-color .16s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #8B6B28; border-color: #8B6B28; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(160,125,44,.35); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 1.8; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; }

components.name: Ghost Action Button
components.description: Secondary action for cancel, test, or non-destructive utility.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #E7E4DB; background: transparent; color: #565C63; font: 600 13.5px/1 "Noto Sans SC", -apple-system, "PingFang SC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; transition: background .16s ease-out, border-color .16s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F3F1EA; border-color: #E7E4DB; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(160,125,44,.35); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Add Entry Button
components.description: Full-width add affordance for settings pages such as agents and skill tools.
components.html: <button class="ds-add-btn"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3l1.8 5.6L19.5 10l-5.7 1.4L12 17l-1.8-5.6L4.5 10l5.7-1.4L12 3Z"/></svg>新增技能</button>
components.css: .ds-add-btn { width: 100%; height: 46px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1.5px dashed #A07D2C; background: #FFFFFF; color: #A07D2C; font: 500 13px/1 "Noto Sans SC", -apple-system, "PingFang SC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background .16s ease-out; } .ds-add-btn:hover { background: #F2EAD6; } .ds-add-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(160,125,44,.35); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-add-btn svg { width: 15px; height: 15px; fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 1.6; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Default admin text input for settings and model configuration.
components.css: .ds-field { display: block; width: 100%; font-family: "Noto Sans SC", -apple-system, "PingFang SC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-field span { display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; color: #969BA1; font-size: 11.5px; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-field input { width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #E7E4DB; background: #FFFFFF; color: #16191D; font: 400 13px/1 "Noto Sans SC", -apple-system, "PingFang SC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-field input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #A07D2C; } .ds-field input:disabled { opacity: .55; cursor: default; }

components.name: Operational Card
components.description: Reusable row/card container for users, agents, tools, and model records.
components.html:
军

增长顾问

增长策略 · 已开通 12 · 成果 38

生效中
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 15px; border-radius: 13px; border: 1px solid #E7E4DB; background: #FFFFFF; color: #16191D; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(22,25,29,.04), 0 2px 8px rgba(22,25,29,.04); font-family: "Noto Sans SC", -apple-system, "PingFang SC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-card-icon { width: 38px; height: 38px; flex: 0 0 38px; border-radius: 10px; background: #F2EAD6; color: #A07D2C; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font: 600 16px/1 "Noto Serif SC", "Songti SC", serif; } .ds-card-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-card p { margin: 4px 0 0; color: #969BA1; font-size: 11.5px; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-chip { font: 500 9.5px/1 SFMono-Regular, "JetBrains Mono", monospace; padding: 3px 6px; border-radius: 5px; background: rgba(155,124,63,.14); color: #9B7C3F; }

components.name: Bottom Navigation Item
components.description: Compact scrollable bottom navigation item for the full-screen admin shell.
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { display: flex; gap: 2px; overflow-x: auto; padding: 11px 8px 0; height: 76px; background: rgba(251,250,246,.94); border-top: 1px solid #EFEDE5; font-family: "Noto Sans SC", -apple-system, "PingFang SC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { flex: 0 0 56px; min-width: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 5px; border: 0; background: transparent; color: #969BA1; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-item-active { color: #A07D2C; } .ds-nav-item span { max-width: 100%; font-size: 10px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-nav-item svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; fill: none; stroke: currentColor; stroke-width: 1.6; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(160,125,44,.35); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 8px; }

components.name: Audit Event Row
components.description: Clickable dense audit row that becomes a mobile event stream.
components.css: .ds-audit-row { width: 100%; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 40px 42px minmax(0,1fr) 66px; grid-template-areas: "status method target time" "summary summary summary summary"; gap: 5px 8px; min-height: 52px; padding: 8px 9px; border: 1px solid #E7E4DB; border-radius: 10px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #565C63; font-family: "Noto Sans SC", -apple-system, "PingFang SC", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: background .16s ease-out; } .ds-audit-row:hover { background: rgba(160,125,44,.06); } .ds-audit-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(160,125,44,.35); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-status { grid-area: status; height: 20px; min-width: 36px; border-radius: 999px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font: 750 10px/1 SFMono-Regular, "JetBrains Mono", monospace; background: rgba(34,141,85,.1); color: #1C7C4B; border: 1px solid rgba(34,141,85,.2); } .ds-method { grid-area: method; font: 750 10px/1 SFMono-Regular, "JetBrains Mono", monospace; color: #43340F; } .ds-target { grid-area: target; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; font: 650 11px/1 SFMono-Regular, "JetBrains Mono", monospace; color: #16191D; } .ds-time { grid-area: time; justify-self: end; font: 650 10px/1 SFMono-Regular, "JetBrains Mono", monospace; color: #969BA1; } .ds-summary { grid-area: summary; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; color: #969BA1; font-size: 10.5px; }

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: Binary setting control for enabled states and memory/runtime switches.
components.css: .ds-switch { width: 42px; height: 24px; border: 0; border-radius: 999px; background: #E7E4DB; position: relative; cursor: pointer; transition: background .2s ease-out; } .ds-switch span { position: absolute; top: 3px; left: 3px; width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; background: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.25); transition: left .2s ease-out; } .ds-switch-on { background: #A07D2C; } .ds-switch-on span { left: 21px; } .ds-switch:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(160,125,44,.35); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
The admin interface is a focused operating desk for a founder-facing AI product: warm enough to belong to 军师, restrained enough for repeated operational work. It uses a paper-and-ink foundation with a single gold command color, so the console feels deliberate rather than promotional. It should feel like a polished internal control room, not a SaaS landing page compressed into an app shell.

The physical scene is an operator checking users, credits, models, logs, and agent settings from a laptop or phone during active support. The interface must scan quickly, hold dense rows without visual panic, and make destructive or system-level actions legible without theatrical styling. Design serves the task: data first, controls second, decoration last.

This system explicitly rejects generic AI-tool marketing, neon model dashboards, over-glassy admin chrome, heavy gradients, and card grids that look interchangeable. It also rejects user-facing sales copy inside operational screens: the product language is "产出额度", "专项能力", "模型配置", "审计", and "技能库", not "充值", "爆款", or "最受欢迎".
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutral surfaces with one restrained gold accent.
Dense but breathable lists, rows, panels, and tables.
Serif only for brand marks, page titles, and key numbers.
Familiar product controls: segmented choices, toggles, text fields, compact buttons.
Full-screen mobile-first admin shell with no decorative frame.

rules.name: The One Command Color Rule
rules.body: Gold is the only brand action color. Do not introduce purple, blue, neon, or rainbow model colors for visual excitement.

rules.name: The Status Is Not Brand Rule
rules.body: Green, red, and warning ochre are reserved for state. Never use them as decorative accents.

rules.name: The Serif Restraint Rule
rules.body: Serif is for identity, headings, and numbers. It is prohibited inside buttons, table cells, dense form labels, and routine metadata.

rules.name: The No Fluid Type Rule
rules.body: Product UI text sizes are fixed. Do not scale font size with viewport width.

rules.name: The Quiet Surface Rule
rules.body: If a shadow is the first thing you notice, it is too strong. Use borders and tonal layers before increasing shadow.

rules.name: The No Nested Cards Rule
rules.body: Page sections can contain repeated cards or rows, but cards must not be placed inside decorative cards.

dos: Do use Command Gold as the only brand action color.
Do keep admin surfaces full-screen, borderless, and task-focused.
Do use add-btn full, ai-btn, mini-btn, ai-field, crd new-agent, and mem-card patterns consistently for new admin settings screens.
Do use mono for timestamps, status codes, system paths, token counts, and IDs.
Do keep mobile audit and settings screens vertically scannable with no horizontal content overflow.
Do use product terms from the app: 专项能力, 产出额度, 模型配置, 技能库, 审计.
Do make every interactive row visibly clickable through cursor, hover, or focus treatment.
donts: Don't use 赠送 / 付费解锁 / 充值 / 最受欢迎 / 灵活付费 as user-facing promotional copy in operational surfaces.
Don't expose Agent Memory to end users; admin can use the term, user-facing surfaces must say 专属理解.
Don't add purple-blue gradients, neon accents, glassmorphism, decorative orbs, or SaaS hero-metric styling.
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px as accents on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts.
Don't create one-off button styles with inline width, padding, and colors when a shared component vocabulary exists.
Don't put cards inside cards or make page sections look like floating decorative cards.
Don't hide payload, status, IP, UA, or timestamp details behind vague labels on audit surfaces.
